data.title: Grant Thornton International and Kingland Celebrate 20 Years of Partnership
data.description: Based in Clear Lake, Iowa, on March 30, 2026, Kingland Systems, a prominent provider of enterprise data, risk, and compliance software, announced a partnership with Grant Thornton International Ltd (GTIL), the global coordinating body for a top professional services organization. This collaboration is set to leverage Kingland's expertise in data management alongside GTIL's extensive network and resources. The move aims to enhance services related to risk management and compliance. Kingland's comprehensive software solutions coupled with GTIL's vast professional reach are expected to create a robust platform serving an extensive client base.

data.title: Survey reveals less than half of crypto users understand when digital assets are taxable. Many misinformation persists.
data.description: A recent survey conducted by Coinbase and CoinTracker revealed that less than 50% of cryptocurrency users have a correct understanding of the circumstances under which digital assets become taxable.

data.title: Hong Kong aims to incorporate tokenized bonds into its financial system, creating scalable infrastructure for digital markets.
data.description: Hong Kong has announced intentions to incorporate tokenized bond issuance and settlement into its financial system, in a move aimed at creating a scalable infrastructure for digital capital markets. This initiative will involve integrating blockchain technology to enable the issuance and settlement of tokenized bonds. The goal is to enhance efficiency and accessibility in the financial sector by leveraging digital assets. This development signifies a significant step towards modernizing Hong Kong's financial ecosystem, as it adapts to technological advancements. The move is part of broader efforts to embrace digital innovation in finance, with the city aiming to position itself as a hub for digital asset transactions. This integration is set to revolutionize the traditional bond market, providing new opportunities for investors and businesses. Stay tuned for more updates as Hong Kong progresses towards this digital transformation in its financial industry.

data.title: Trilitech expands tokenized commodities on Tezos via Metals.io, offering new platform for trading uranium & metals crucial for AI industry.
data.description: Trilitech has introduced a cutting-edge platform for exchanging tokenized uranium and essential metals pivotal for advancing the artificial intelligence sector.

data.title: Aave V4 now live on Ethereum after vote, featuring Aave Pro for advanced users & Chainlink integration for V4 markets.
data.description: Aave Pro has been incorporated into the strategic rollout for advanced users, along with the integration of Chainlink to offer oracle data for V4 markets.

data.title: Real Estate Expert Justus Smith of Keystone Highlights North Florida's Appeal for HelloNation
data.description: In a recent article by HelloNation, the unique appeal of North Florida within the Sunshine State is highlighted. The piece delves into what sets this region apart, emphasizing its picturesque landscapes, tight-knit communities, and thriving real estate market. By blending stunning natural beauty with welcoming neighborhoods and a buoyant housing sector, North Florida offers a lifestyle that stands out from the rest.

data.title: AudioCodes Announces Filing of Form 20-F for the Fiscal Year Ended December 31, 2025
data.description: OR YEHUDA, Israel - March 30, 2026 - AudioCodes Ltd. (NASDAQ: AUDC), a prominent provider of enterprise voice and VoiceAI solutions, revealed the submission of its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the year. The report encompasses its audited financial statements and other essential information for stakeholders. This move signifies transparency and compliance within the company's operations. AudioCodes continues to be a leading player in the industry, catering to a global market.

data.title: HUNGRY HOWIE'S INTRODUCES NEW LIMITED-TIME PINEAPPLE JALAPEÑO FLAVORED CRUST®
data.description: A popular pizza franchise, renowned for introducing Flavored Crust®, is introducing a new sweet-heat innovation to revitalize the pizza industry's divisive discussion. Hungry Howie's, hailing from Madison Heights, Michigan, shared this news on March 30, 2026, through a press release. This development will be rolled out across the nation.

data.title: Wood Partners and PGIM Announce Amenity-Rich Multifamily Community in Morrisville, North Carolina
data.description: Breaking ground this month in Raleigh, North Carolina, is the Alta Watkins project, comprising 357 units. Developed by Wood Partners in collaboration with PGIM, the world's second-largest real estate investment firm, this development marks a significant milestone in the multifamily sector in Morrisville. The partnership has successfully closed on the project, signaling a positive start to their venture.

data.title: Heineken® Launches “The Clinker” at This Year’s Coachella, to Spark New Connections Between Fans With a Simple ‘Cheers’
data.description: In Amsterdam on March 30, 2026, it was announced that Heineken ® will introduce a new innovation at Coachella Valley Music & Arts Festival. The festival is being supported by Heineken ® as part of their ongoing sponsorship. The new innovation aims to bring fans together through their mutual passion for music.

data.title: Coupa Inspire 2026 Showcases Real AI Results for Business Network Impact with Global Brands
data.description: Coupa has launched AI DevCon, a groundbreaking conference for developers and builders in the procurement industry. Held in Foster City, California on March 30, 2026, the event allows participants to create and customize their own AI agents with the help of experts. Coupa, known for its cutting-edge autonomous spend management platform, aims to empower attendees to harness AI technologies.

data.title: What to Bring to Your Tax Appointment: HelloNation Article Features Tax Preparation Expert Josh Adams
data.description: An article highlights essential records to assist taxpayers in verifying income, managing deductions, and preventing filing delays. Released in North Chesterfield, Virginia on March 30, 2026, by PRNewswire, it provides key insights on preparing for tax consultations. HelloNation's recent publication addresses strategies for efficient tax preparation by outlining necessary documents for taxpayers to collect before meeting with a preparer.

data.title: In HelloNation, Restoration Expert Peyton Cripe of Goshen, IN, Shares the Health & Efficiency Benefits of Air Duct Cleaning
data.description: In Goshen, Indiana on March 30, 2026, an article on HelloNation delved into the impact of air duct condition on home air quality and energy efficiency. Peyton Cripe from Terry's Cleaning & Restoration discussed the benefits of air duct cleaning in enhancing indoor air quality and reducing energy consumption. The article sheds light on how maintaining clean air ducts can significantly improve the overall well-being of a household, potentially leading to better health outcomes and lower energy bills.

data.title: Uniti Fiber Names Heather Orrico to Lead Enterprise Sales
data.description: Heather Orrico has been appointed by Uniti Fiber to lead its enterprise sales strategy and drive expansion in the southeastern region of the country. Orrico's role will focus on boosting sales efforts for the company in this region, aiming to capitalize on business opportunities and achieve growth targets. With her expertise and experience, Orrico will play a pivotal role in enhancing Uniti Fiber's presence and performance in the southeast.

data.title: Meitu 2025 Annual Results: Adjusted Net Profit Surges 64.7% YoY to a Record RMB 965 Million, Driven by AI Transformation
data.description: In 2025, Meitu, Inc. experienced significant financial growth, following its strategy focused on "Productivity and Globalisation." The company's total revenues from ongoing operations increased by 28.8% year-over-year, reaching RMB 3.86 billion. The core business sector, including Photo, Video, and Design Products, saw a substantial revenue surge of 41.6% YoY to RMB 2.95 billion. Additionally, Non-IFRS Adjusted Net Profit showed a remarkable increase of 64.7% YoY, amounting to RMB 965 million. This growth was mainly attributed to the rapid adoption of AI Agents integrated into their products.
